Add /setup wizard skill for first-time configuration

generates agent_prompt.txt from user's resume and answers, customizes
filters.yaml, and runs first database sync.

commit.message:
Enhance prompt: technique tags in step titles, richer detail, 12K tokens

Each step title now includes applicable techniques in parentheses
(e.g. "Mountains (wet-on-wet, light wash)"). Instructions are full
paragraphs with specific color mixes and technique guidance.
max_tokens raised from 8000 to 12000 to accommodate longer output.

repository.description: Drop in a watercolor image and get instructions for how to paint it — Beginner, Intermediate, and Expert levels.

commit.message:
Fix: spell class labels, wildshape/familiar modal stat blocks

spelltome.html + spelltome.css:
- Class list now shows ONLY classes with access (was showing all 8 always)
- Remove │ pipe character appended to each accessible class name
- Add .class-list CSS (was completely unstyled — caused messy overflow in 52px col)
- .class-item.has-access: small dark pill; .class-item.is-current: school-coloured
- Widen card-stats right column: minmax(0,52px) → minmax(0,80px)

wildshape.css — add all missing modal content styles:
- .ab-grid / .ab-box / .abl / .abs / .abm  →  6-column ability score grid
  (was rendering as a vertical list — STR, 3, -4, DEX, 15... each on own line)
- .stat-box .lb: add display:block so label sits above value properly
- .msec / .msec-label / .mabil  →  Traits / Actions section styling
- .eligibility-panel / .eligibility-title / .eligibility-row / .ok / .no
  →  Wildshape eligibility panel with green/red pass/fail colours
- @media ≤480px: .ab-grid collapses to 3 columns on very small phones

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rewrite agent to use @anthropic-ai/sdk directly

Replace deepagents + LangChain with @anthropic-ai/sdk and custom
coding tools (execute, read_file, write_file, edit_file, ls, glob, grep).
Move source to src/agent.js for consistency with other agents. Add
msg.type === "message" gate, error+response done:true pattern, persistent
memory, and full manifest fields (default_model, env_var, delegation).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(register): add optional resume upload in Step 4 (Skills)

- New card at bottom of Step 4: label, subtext, hidden file input
  (accept .pdf/.doc/.docx), styled drop area matching existing UI
- s4-resume-file change listener sets window._resumeFile + saveResumeToIDB
- updateResumeDisplay() and removeResumeFile() updated to sync s4 elements
  alongside existing step-0 and step-5 display nodes
- submitDPR() resume upload now uses POST /api/candidate/resume (session-derived
  profileId, no data.post_id needed) and is truly optional (skips if no file)

black and white monkey, and peg grab detection.

so checkout and portal sessions always get valid success/cancel URLs.

commit.message:
feat(resume): add upload/replace resume from dashboard

routes/candidate.js:
- Add POST /api/candidate/resume — derives profileId from session,
  validates mimetype (PDF/DOC/DOCX), stores LONGBLOB in agzit_resume_files,
  upserts postmeta (has_resume, resume_filename, resume_upload, resume_uploaded_at),
  returns { ok, filename, path }
- No new DB columns needed (resume_filename already in postmeta + profile response)

public/dashboard/index.html:
- Rewrite renderResume() — shows filename + Download button when resume exists,
  always renders hidden file input + Upload/Replace button below status card
- Add uploadResume() — POSTs multipart to /api/candidate/resume, re-renders on success
- Add CSS for .resume-upload-btn and feedback colours

commit.message:
Switch earnings calendar to Finnhub, fix Yahoo Finance indices

- Add Finnhub client (src/lib/finnhub.ts) for earnings calendar API
  with FINNHUB_API_KEY, replacing FMP legacy endpoint (403)
- Rewrite Yahoo Finance to use v8 chart API with cache: no-store,
  dropping fragile crumb+cookie v7 approach that caused 0.00% values
- Update dashboard, calendar page, and API route to use Finnhub
- Mark market API route as force-dynamic
- Update CLAUDE.md with Finnhub in stack, env vars, rate limits

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(dashboard): add Job Preferences tab

New tab between Profile and Scorecard — displays and edits:
desired_role, employment_status, notice_period_in_days,
current/expected CTC, open_to_relocate.

Saves via existing PUT /api/candidate/profile (all fields already
in SCALAR_FIELDS). Pre-fills from profile API response on load.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

common: add OPNsense subnet routing fix for all VLAN ranges

Move Tailscale/OPNsense subnet route workaround from per-host configs into
common.nix so every NixOS host gets it. Extends coverage from 192.168.0.0/20
to also include 192.168.16.0/20 (GUEST .20, HOME_ASSIST .21 VLANs).
Removes duplicate from vm01 and pihole.nix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- .party-slot-bonus: 40px → 64px width, 0.75rem → 1rem font-size,

  legible in the Edit Party modal
- Add .party-slot-header row with "Name" / "Init ±" column labels so the
  purpose of the bonus field is immediately obvious

Fix mobile nav: add coach items and wire Más button to sidebar

- Add coach-specific nav items (Disponibilidad, Compensación, Referidos)
- Use session role to show correct nav for admin/coach/client
- Wire "Más" button to open sidebar drawer instead of linking to /equipo

commit.message:
feat(api): Buildkite webhook token verification (#7) (#36)

* feat(api): add Buildkite webhook token verification (#7)

- Add X-Buildkite-Token header verification to POST /api/v1/webhooks/buildkite
- Constant-time comparison via MessageDigest.isEqual to prevent timing attacks
- Pass-through when BUILDKITE_WEBHOOK_TOKEN is not configured (backwards compatible)
- 4 new tests: valid token, wrong token, missing token, unconfigured token
- Add buildkite.webhook.token property to application.yml

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test(api): add Buildkite webhook token integration tests

Add BuildkiteWebhookTokenIntegrationTest covering the full HTTP stack
with a configured token: valid token → 202, wrong token → 401,
missing token → 401.

Rename the existing smoke test in HttpEndpointsIntegrationTest to
clarify it exercises the no-token-configured pass-through behaviour.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Fix PDF signature positioning accuracy and add tkinter GUI

- Fix page rotation bug: positions now match visual corners for PDFs
  with /Rotate property (90, 180, 270 CW) using inverse canvas transforms
- Fix mediabox offset: overlay canvas now accounts for non-zero
  mediabox lower-left origin so signatures land inside the visible area
- Add exempt_pages parameter to PDFSignature to skip specific pages
  (e.g. keep page 3 blank for a physical signature)
- Add full tkinter GUI launched by `python pdf_signature.py` with
  file pickers, position buttons, sliders, live preview, and log output
- Fix web UI position buttons: replace confusing numbers (1-4) with
  directional arrows (↖ ↗ ↙ ↘)
- Fix web UI preview aspect ratio to use actual uploaded signature dimensions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add /apply-manual usage to README

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: ニュースデータを自動更新 (2026-03-11 06:12)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 20 security, performance & reliability improvements across backend+frontend

Security:
- API key lookup uses hash comparison instead of plaintext (main.py)
- _get_real_ip() only trusts proxy headers when client is localhost
- Login lockout uses real client IP, not proxy IP
- Rate limit added on /2fa/confirm-login
- XSS: _esc() applied to domain/risk_level in email templates

Bug fixes:
- Plan 'dev' added to scheduler, scans, admin, payment checks
- Named auditor references replace fragile list indices in scanner.py
- LoginPage uses loginWithToken() instead of double login() call
- AppAuditor: body validation for .env/.git, 302 on /admin not flagged
- lstrip("www.") replaced with proper prefix check
- Dead _counts dict removed from metrics.py
- Hacker scenarios loop rewritten with clean for/else pattern

Performance:
- N+1 query in admin list_users replaced with single subquery JOIN
- SQLite WAL mode + busy_timeout=5000ms

Reliability:
- DB session wrapped in try/finally in PDF generation
- Dashboard useEffect cleanup clears all timeouts
- HTTP connections closed with finally: conn.close()
- resp.read() bounded: 1MB RDAP/HIBP, 2MB crt.sh/CT
- asyncio.get_event_loop() → get_running_loop() across 12+ files

Tests: 1367 passed, 0 failed. TS: 0 errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: Wezea
repository.description: Wezea Security Scanner

commit.message:
Auto-update aiswitch silently on every run

Spawns a disowned background job on each invocation that fetches the
latest aiswitch.sh from GitHub and replaces the local copy if changed.
Notifies via /dev/tty only when an update is applied.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Don't kill current claude session when switching profiles

pkill -x claude was killing the session running aiswitch, causing
claude to prompt for login on next launch. Now only kills claude/codex
processes from other terminal sessions (different session ID).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Hide typing indicator for the current user

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add static Netlify form to index.html for form detection

React SPAs render forms via JS, so Netlify can't detect them at build
time. Adding a hidden static copy of the contact form in index.html
lets Netlify detect and register it during deployment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Extract candidate filters to filters.yaml

Filters (location, experience, functions, title/company exclusions) are now
configured in filters.yaml instead of hardcoded in Python. Available options
documented as comments. Apply changes with `python sync.py --rebuild`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Enable admin email scheduling and create system-wide Little Free Shop admin

Schedule mail:admin:copy (hourly) to copy suggested admins to per-group
copies for moderator approval, and mail:admin:send (hourly) to send
approved admins to group members via spool.

Created suggested admin record (id 85339, groupid=NULL) so the copy
command will distribute the Little Free Shop email to all Freegle groups.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

test: add extended filter scenarios for /notifyme subscribe command (#33)

- Add unit tests: delete success with Novu cleanup, delete with remaining subs, 404 case

- Return error for malformed filter expressions instead of silently ignoring them
- Support comma-separated values as IN operator (e.g. repo=api,web → IN [api, web])
- Validate filter field names against GET /notification-types/{key}/filters endpoint
- Add unit tests covering all new filter scenarios

New tests covering:
- Service failure returns error message
- Multiple EQ filters all passed to service
- Mixed EQ and IN filters use correct operators
- Filter definition API failure falls back gracefully without field validation
- Empty filter definitions allow any field name
- Stops at first malformed filter without calling service
- Filter value containing = sign is preserved (split on first = only)

commit.message:
DAW: debug panel, 32 voices, mono key release fix

- Debug panel (Dbg button in transport): voice grid colored by bus,
  lifecycle log, sound log/WAV/voice log controls, kill-all button
- Voice lifecycle ring buffer logs every alloc/release with source
- NUM_VOICES 16 → 32 (busy patterns saturated 16)
- Fix mono mode: releasing first key no longer kills sound when
  second key still held (glides back to remaining held key)
- Pluck brightness/damping wired, sustain slider range fixed
- Mono/glide enabled for mallet and pluck wave types
- Arp rewrite: single persistent voice, chord mode (1 key) vs
  held-keys mode (2+ keys), no retrigger jank

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix profile GET crash - wrap agzit_resume_files query in try-catch

The query to check agzit_resume_files was crashing the entire profile
endpoint when the table was empty or had unexpected state, causing the
Profile tab to show "No DPR Profile Yet" even for existing DPRs.

Update README after removing old findbug gem repo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add real-time websocket updates to cache demo page

All cache operations (increment, store, flush) now broadcast to all
viewers via the DemoCacheUpdated event on the public demo channel.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add README, update CLAUDE.md with new filters

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add database indexes for category loading performance

Performance Improvement:
- Add indexes to transaction_details table (category_id, customer_id, status)
- Add composite index optimized for category lookup query pattern
- Add indexes to tbllevelmanagement table (levelId, isActive)
- Expected improvement: 6-7 seconds → under 1 second

Indexes added:
- transaction_details: idx_category_id, idx_customer_id, idx_status
- transaction_details: idx_category_lookup (composite for JOIN optimization)
- tbllevelmanagement: idx_level_id, idx_is_active, idx_active_level

These indexes will be automatically applied on next Railway deployment.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Fix work auth/sponsorship answers, add company/title exclusions, increase batch size

- Work auth → Yes, sponsorship → No (TN visa is not sponsorship)
- Current company → N/A (left Amazon)
- Exclude SpaceX (citizenship required) and PhD roles from candidates
- Increase min batch size to 20 (was concurrency*3, too frequent Chrome resets)
- find_manual_candidates() joins through candidates table (inherits all filters)
- Remove exclusions from check_liveness() (unnecessary, handled by candidates join)

feat: position correlation panel in Paper Trading tab

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(unified): use module_integrity for L4 attestation level

The legacy file_integrity check treats server-only files (not present
on client) as "missing" and fails the check. The unified module_integrity
properly handles these by excluding them.

This fix:
- Updates L4 attestation to prefer module_integrity.valid
- Falls back to legacy file_integrity if module_integrity unavailable
- Updates degradation detection to use same logic

Fixes issue where 1140/1140 disk files matching registry still showed
"Issues Found" and 3/5 attestation due to 24 server-only files in manifest.

Bump to v1.1.18.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix existing DPR data, add resume to Edit Profile, sync names everywhere

Backend (routes/candidate.js):
- Profile GET now checks agzit_resume_files table to auto-heal missing
  has_resume/resume_upload meta for existing DPRs
- Returns resume_filename and resume_uploaded_at in profile response
- PUT /profile now syncs full_name changes to agzit_users (first/last),
  wp_users (display_name), and wp_usermeta (first_name, last_name)

Dashboard (dashboard/index.html):
- All "Update DPR Profile" links now point to /profile-edit instead of
  WordPress registration URL
- Resume download links use /api/candidate/download endpoint
- "To replace" text now says "Edit Profile" with link

Edit Profile (profile-edit/index.html):
- Added Section 6: Resume — shows current resume status with download
  and replace/upload button
- Resume upload calls existing /api/candidate/dpr/:postId/resume endpoint
- Validates PDF type and 10MB size limit
- Renumbered Skills to 7, Visibility to 8

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(books): convert added_at epoch ms to ISO string for TIMESTAMPTZ column

Same bug as movies: bookToRow was passing Date.now() (e.g. 1741644000000)
directly to added_at, but books.added_at is TIMESTAMPTZ in Supabase.
Postgres rejects the raw integer with "date/time field value out of range".

Fix mirrors the movies fix: new Date(b.addedAt).toISOString() converts
any legacy number timestamp or ISO string correctly before sending.

project root.

commit.message:
Optimize dashboardCategory endpoint - fix N+1 query performance issue

Performance Improvement:
- Replace N+1 query pattern with single LEFT JOIN query
- Before: 1 + N queries (1 for categories + 1 for each category subscription check)
- After: 1 single query with LEFT JOIN
- Significantly faster category loading (50 categories: 51 queries → 1 query)

Changes:
- Use DB query builder with LEFT JOIN on transaction_details
- Calculate isSubscribed in SQL using CASE statement
- Maintain same response format for backward compatibility

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove Anthropic key from setup flow; only LogiQ key needed

- keys setup: prompt for LogiQ key only (used for both Claude + Codex)
- keys status/delete: remove all anthropic key references
- aiswitch status: show single LogiQ key entry
- Remove unused _aiswitch_anthropic_key() function

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rename ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to CLAUDE_API_KEY to avoid env conflict

Claude Code sets ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in the shell environment, which
overrides .env.local in Next.js. Renamed to CLAUDE_API_KEY to prevent
the collision.
